title: Build Claude analysis engine for booth demo sessions
description: Send the correlated timeline to Claude API (via RONE AI endpoint) for analysis. Claude should determine: (1) which products/features were shown, (2) what the visitor asked about or showed interest in, (3) key moments worth highlighting, (4) recommended follow-up actions for the SDR. Use recording-analyzer engine pattern (modular, template-based). Output summary.json matching DATA-CONTRACT.md schema.

substeps.title: Create engines/claude_client.py — Anthropic client configured for RONE endpoint
substeps.notes: get_client() reads RONE_AI_BASE_URL and RONE_AI_API_KEY (fallback ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)

substeps.title: Create engines/prompts.py — System prompts and user message templates
substeps.notes: SYSTEM_FACTUAL, SYSTEM_RECOMMENDATIONS, FACTUAL_EXTRACTION_PROMPT, RECOMMENDATIONS_PROMPT as module-level constants

substeps.title: Create engines/analyzer.py — SessionAnalyzer class with two-pass Claude analysis
substeps.notes: Pass 1: factual extraction with up to 10 screenshots as vision blocks. Pass 2: recommendations from factual JSON. Both use streaming with get_final_message(). Handles local and S3 session dirs.

substeps.title: Create analyze.py — CLI entry point with argparse
substeps.notes: Usage: python analyze.py <session_dir> [output_dir] [--dry-run]. Writes summary.json and follow-up.json. Supports S3 output.

substeps.title: Create sample_data/ — Realistic sample session files for testing
substeps.notes: sample_metadata.json, sample_clicks.json (10 events), sample_transcript.json (20 entries). Scenario: Priya Sharma, financial firm, BYOD + XDR demo.

research_notes: Two-pass Claude analysis chosen to separate factual grounding from opinion/recommendations — reduces hallucination risk. Pass 1 uses vision (up to 10 screenshots as base64 image blocks) to ground product identification in what was actually shown on screen. Pass 2 receives Pass 1 JSON as input and generates SDR-actionable recommendations. RONE AI endpoint configured via RONE_AI_BASE_URL env var (default api.anthropic.com); API key via RONE_AI_API_KEY with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY fallback. Streaming (client.messages.stream + get_final_message()) used for both passes for performance. Screenshot count capped at 10 to stay within token budget (~$0.15-0.25 per session at opus pricing). Model: claude-opus-4-6 with adaptive thinking for reasoning quality.
tests: Feed sample timeline -> summary.json has all required fields
Products shown list is accurate (not hallucinated)
Visitor interests have evidence field referencing actual transcript/click
Analysis completes within 60 seconds for a 15-minute demo
